lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: Welcome to the vinery. Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I farm here?

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: Let's see... First, you'll need to treat the soil with saltpetre. Dig it into the patch with a trowel. The minerals are good for the fruit.

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: Then plant a grape seed, and just let it grow. I'll look after it, so it won't get diseased.

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: When your grapes are ready, pick them and clear the patch so you can grow a new vine.

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: Does that seem clear, or would you like help with something else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do?

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: I'm the vintner. I helped Lord Hosidius to develop this land as a vinery, and now it's complete he's put me in charge of production while he works on a new project.

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: His son, young Pandur, works here too. Pandur checks the wine I produce. But if you've got any questions about the farming, don't ask Pandur. Ask me instead. He checks the wine too much.

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: I'm the vintner. I helped the late Lord Hosidius develop this land as a vinery. He put me in charge of production once it was completed.

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: The new Lord Hosidius used to work here as well. He has new duties of course, but that hasn't stopped him coming down to check the wine I produce.

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: So can I help you with anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you called Gallow?

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: It's short for 'Gallows'. When I was young, a boy made some improper suggestions to me, so I grabbed him by his neck and held him in the air until he learnt some manners.

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: Now, dear, do you need help with the vinery? I'm enjoying the chat, but I have work to do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

sections.title: Talking to her with the challenge scroll

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: No, try again.

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: Correct!

lines.speaker: Gallow
lines.text: I have a question for you.
